header.pointsGuestHint: Sign in to see your reward balance

verify.metaDescription: Enter the one-time code sent when you signed up.
verify.title: Confirm your email
verify.subtitle: Enter the verification code from your inbox. You can sign in with your username or email below.
verify.otpHint: 6-digit code from the email we sent you. Check spam if you don’t see it.
verify.errorOtpExpired: This code has expired or isn’t valid anymore. Sign up again to get a fresh email, or use the code from the most recent message we sent.
verify.errorOtpWrong: That code doesn’t match. Copy the six digits from your verification email exactly.
verify.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
verify.resendSuccess: If your account is waiting for verification, we sent a new code. Check your inbox and spam.
verify.resendWait: Please wait a bit before requesting another code.
verify.resendNeedIdentity: Enter your username or email above first.

account.metaDescriptionProfile: View and update your profile and contact details.
account.title: Profile & security
account.subtitle: Redeem a membership code, keep your details current, and manage your password.
account.notSignedIn: Session expired. Please sign in again.
account.passwordHint: Use at least 6 characters. You will stay signed in on this device.
account.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters.
account.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
account.activateSubtitle: Enter the code you were given to apply your plan and credits to this account.
account.activateSuccess: Your code was applied. Credits and plan access are updated.

pricing.metaDescription: Member plans and credit top-ups for AI Minions. Transparent pricing in MMK.
pricing.title: Simple pricing for serious creators
pricing.subtitle: Choose a membership tier for full studio access, or top up credits whenever you need more runway. All prices in Myanmar Kyat (MMK).
pricing.sectionPlansDesc: Duration-based access with bundled credits — best for steady production.
pricing.sectionTopupDesc: Add credits without changing your plan — ideal for bursts of work.
pricing.loadError: We couldn’t load pricing right now. Please try again later.
pricing.emptyPlans: No membership tiers are published yet.
pricing.emptyTopup: No top-up packs are published yet.
pricing.footnote: Taxes may apply. Features subject to fair use. Contact support for teams.
